---
title: "Blog"
description: "R programming, data analysis, survey methodology, and data storytelling for Indian economic research."
page-label: "Writing"
page-band: true
categories: [R, ggplot2, data.table, Quarto, Survey]

page-layout: full
toc: false

listing:
  id: blog-listing
  contents: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
  date-format: "D MMM YYYY"
---

::: {#blog-listing}
:::
